mapIntent(VScanEntry, Intent, int) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
Assigns an Intent to a physical key.
mapKeyCode(VScanEntry, KeyCodeEntry) - 类 中的方法com.android.device.input.KeyboardManager
Assigns a virtual key code to a physical key.
Matrix25 - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Matrix25 is the class that configures the Matrix 2/5 Symbology.
Matrix25(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Matrix25
This is the constructor of Matrix25.
matrix25 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Matrix 2 of 5 barcode reading capabilities.
Maxicode - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Maxicode is the class that configures the Maxicode Symbology.
Maxicode(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Maxicode
This is the constructor of Maxicode.
maxicode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Maxicode barcode reading capabilities.

Micropdf417 - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Micropdf417 is the class that configures the MicroPDF-417 Symbology.
Micropdf417(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Micropdf417
This is the constructor of Micropdf417.
micropdf417 - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Micro PDF417 barcode reading capabilities.

MicroQR is the class that configures the Micro QR Code Symbology.
MicroQR(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.MicroQR
This is the constructor of MicroQR.
microQr - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the Micro QR Code barcode reading capabilities.
MIRROR_MODE - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
mirrorMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerOptions
 
mode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.FrameCaptureConfiguration
mode selects the Scanner frame capture mode.
Msi - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
Msi is the class that configures the MSI Symbology.
Msi(PropertyGetter) - 类 的构造器com.android.decode.configuration.Msi
This is the constructor of Msi.
msi - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
Controls the MSI barcode reading capabilities.

MSI_CHECK_2_MOD_11 - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID

MSI_USER_ID - 类 中的静态变量com.android.decode.PropertyID
 
msiReduced - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.LinearQuietZones
msiReduced enables the reading of MSI barcode labels with short quiet zones.
multiResultSendMode - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.MultiScan
 
MultiScan - com.android.decode.configuration中的类
MultiScan is the class that configures the Multi Scan functionality.

This is the constructor of MultiScan.
multiScan - 类 中的变量com.android.decode.configuration.ScannerProperties
